---
title: 'Picture'
date: '2017-08-21T11:25:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8456319060148653160'
blogger_filename: '/2017/08/picture.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<p dir="ltr">I woke up. I saw the photo I'm using as your contact photo. From 2005. You were very pretty. Maybe if you got your ideal weight I can find my mojo again? Is it won't to not find you attractive at 300+ lbs? I mean, God made me visual right? There's a piece of that that is God created? I don't need you to be perfect, or model material, but fit-ish? At least average fit? <u>Hmmm</u></p>
